info.name: SchemaForge — Sprint 1–6 (Full)
info.description:
Complete API test collection for the Oracle → PostgreSQL SchemaForge backend.

Covers all endpoints API-01 to API-12 across all sprints.

Base URL: http://localhost:8080

Import this file into Postman (File → Import) to instantly have all requests ready to run.

**Pre-requisites:**
1. Run `docker compose up -d` to start PostgreSQL.
2. Run the Spring Boot backend (`mvn spring-boot:run`).
3. Set the `run_id` collection variable after running API-01.

variable.description: Base URL of the running Spring Boot backend.
UUID of the MigrationRun. Populate this from the API-01 response 'id' field before running other requests.

item.name: Sprint 1 — Upload Endpoint
item.description: All four test cases for POST /api/v1/migrations/upload

request.description:
**API-01 — Happy Path**

Uploads a valid Oracle DDL `.sql` file. Returns a `MigrationRun` with status `PARSED`.

**Expected:** `201 Created`

> **Copy the `id` from the response and set it as the `run_id` collection variable.**

item.name: API-02 | Upload with custom file_name override
API-03 | Upload non-.sql file → 400 Bad Request

request.description:
**API-03 — Invalid file type**

**Expected:** `400 Bad Request` — `Uploaded file is not a valid SQL file.`

item.name: API-04 | Upload oversized file → 413 Payload Too Large

request.description:
**API-04 — File exceeds 10MB limit**

**Expected:** `413 Payload Too Large`

item.name: Sprint 2 — Compatibility Analysis
item.description: Endpoints to run and retrieve compatibility analysis (API-05 and API-06)

request.description:
**API-05 — Run Analysis**

Triggers the `CompatibilityAnalyzer` for the given run. Detects `NUMBER`, `VARCHAR2`, `ROWNUM`, `SYSDATE`, sequences, and other Oracle-specifics.

**Expected:** `201 Created` with severity counts and issues list.

**API-06 — Get Analysis**

Retrieves a previously persisted analysis report from PostgreSQL.

**Expected:** `200 OK` with the report.

item.name: Sprint 3 — Conversion Engine
item.description: Convert Oracle SQL to PostgreSQL-compatible DDL (API-07 and API-08)

request.description:
**API-07 — Run Conversion**

Runs `SqlConverter` over the raw Oracle SQL. Applies string-safe replacements: `NVL→COALESCE`, `NVL2→CASE`, `ROWNUM→LIMIT`, type aliases (`NUMBER→NUMERIC`, `VARCHAR2→VARCHAR`), `SYSDATE→CURRENT_TIMESTAMP`, sequence syntax, and adds review comments for un-automatable HIGH severity constructs.

**Expected:** `201 Created` with `originalSql` and `convertedSql`.

**API-08 — Get Converted Script**

Retrieves the persisted PostgreSQL DDL as `text/plain`.

**Expected:** `200 OK`, `Content-Type: text/plain`.

item.name: Sprint 5 — Validation Engine
item.description: Run row-count, null-count, and data-type validation against target DB (API-09 and API-10)

request.description:
**API-09 — Run Validation**

For each table in the parsed schema, queries both source (Oracle mock) and target (PostgreSQL) for row counts. Returns a `ValidationResult` with per-table `TableValidationMetric` records.

**Expected:** `201 Created` with `validationStatus` of `PASSED` or `WARNING`.

**API-10 — Get Validation Result**

Retrieves the persisted validation result and per-table metrics.

**Expected:** `200 OK`.

item.name: Sprint 6 — Report & Export
item.description: Aggregated report and file export endpoints (API-11 and API-12)

request.description:
**API-11 — Get Full Aggregated Report**

Returns a single `FullReportDto` JSON object aggregating:
- The `MigrationRun` record (file name, status, table/column counts)
- The `AnalysisReport` (severity counts + issues list, or `null` if not yet run)
- The `ConvertedScript` (original and converted SQL, or `null` if not yet run)
- The `ValidationResult` (status + per-table metrics, or `null` if not yet run)

**Expected:** `200 OK` with a composite JSON body.

**API-12a — Export PDF Report**

Generates and streams a binary PDF report using OpenPDF. The file includes a page header (`SchemaForge - Official Report`) and auto-numbered page footer. Sections cover the run summary, analysis severity breakdown, and validation results.

**Expected:** `200 OK`, `Content-Type: application/pdf`, `Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=report-<uuid>.pdf`.

**API-12b — Export JSON Report**

Streams the same `FullReportDto` as a downloadable `.json` file.

**Expected:** `200 OK`, `Content-Type: application/json`, `Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=report-<uuid>.json`.
